name: claude-theater
description: A live, grouped office of your Claude Code subagents — inside VS Code.

claudeTheater.port.description: Port the Claude Theater server listens on (127.0.0.1).

claudeTheater.autoStartServer.description: If the server isn't already running, start it automatically with `python -m claude_theater`.

claudeTheater.pythonPath.description: Path to the Python interpreter used to auto-start the server. Empty = try `python`, then `py`, then `python3`.
